title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese extracts four rules for prompting Claude Code effectively, drawn from studying Anthropic engineers' practices. The rules emphasize prompting for skills rather than direct outputs, building composable and reusable skills, and iterative skill improvement across sessions. Marchese claims most users apply these techniques incorrectly.
